title: pouteria dominigensis f. cuprea
intro: Pouteria dominigensis f. cuprea, also known as the copper pod tree, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pouteria dominigensis f. cuprea include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting overall well-being. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used to treat conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections.
